pr.title: Late STE QAT + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Overtone + SWA + SGD TTT (int6+zstd-22)

output.summary: Late STE QAT on a dense 9×512 stack with SmearGate/BigramHash, Muon+AdamW with SWA, per-row int6+zstd, and full-model SGD TTT after sliding-window eval.
techniques: - Late STE QAT tail with Muon+AdamW and SWA
- Per-row int6 quantization + zstd-22 compression to stay under 16MB
- SmearGate+BigramHash stack with full-model SGD TTT after sliding-window eval
